name: Shadowdark Starter
description: Original solo/co-op table set: terrain, points of interest, weather, per-terrain encounters, dungeon stocking and dressing, NPCs, rumors, treasure, reaction and morale. Tables chain into each other and tagged tables drive hex exploration.

tables.name: Terrain
tables.description: Rolled when exploration generates a hex with no terrain. Results must be terrain ids.

rows.result: plains
forest
mountain
water
swamp
desert
snow
volcanic

tables.name: Points of Interest
tables.description: What stands out in a freshly explored hex.

rows.result: Toppled watchtower, its beacon brazier long cold
Ring of standing stones humming faintly at dusk
Abandoned wagon, cargo picked over, tracks leading away
Shrine to a forgotten god, offerings still fresh
Sinkhole opening into darkness below
Hermit's hut on stilts
Old battlefield, rusted weapons in the grass
Crumbling bridge over a gorge
Grove of trees grown in an unnaturally perfect spiral
Burned homestead, chimney still standing
Waymarker cairn with a warning scratched in three languages
Hot spring, steam carrying a faint metallic smell
Gibbet cage swinging empty at a crossroads
Half-buried statue of a robed figure, face chiseled off
Traveling peddler camped beside the trail
Nothing of note, just distance and weather
Storm - travel is hard, checks to navigate

Overcast, wind from the west

Corpse lights drifting between the trees

A crocodile the length of a longboat, still as a log
Whiteout - visibility drops to arm's length

Frozen lake crossing, ice groaning underfoot
{1d4} yetis loping along the ridgeline
Aurora that forms shapes almost like script

The mountain clears its throat. Everything goes quiet

Monster

rows.notes: roll or pick: pit, dart, gas, collapsing ceiling, glyph

rows.result: Treasure, guarded or hidden
Something special
rows.notes: shaft to another level, talking statue, portal, prisoner

tables.name: Dungeon Dressing
tables.description: Texture for an otherwise empty room.

rows.result: Scorch marks up one wall, soot shadow of a figure
Shallow standing water, something glints in it
Rows of empty iron sconces, all bent the same direction
Bones swept into a neat pile
Mural defaced with fresh paint
Cold draft from a crack too narrow to follow
Broken furniture stacked as a barricade, long abandoned
Tally marks in the hundreds scratched at knee height
Smell of incense with no source
Dripping ceiling, drops land in perfect rhythm
Door lintel carved with a warning
Rat king's nest of shredded vestments
{2d6} giant rats boiling out of the walls
{1d6} skeletons in rusted mail
{2d4} goblins with a crude alarm system
{1d4} zombies wedged behind a door
Gelatinous cube, doorway-clean and patient
{1d6} ghouls gnawing in the dark
A rust monster snuffling after metal
Something worse than this level should hold
rows.notes: use the nastiest thing you have stats for

tables.name: NPC Name
tables.description: Chains through motivation and quirk for a full sketch.

Owes a debt that cannot be paid in coin
Searching for a sibling who joined a cult
Fleeing a contract signed in bad faith
Collecting proof that a local hero is a fraud
Trying to buy back a family holding
Sworn to deliver a message, contents unknown
Wants revenge but keeps finding reasons to wait
Smuggling something harmless as if it were deadly
Believes they are under a curse. They might be
Recruiting for an expedition nobody returns from
Hiding from someone who thinks they're dead
Just wants to see the ocean before winter
Counts everything in threes under their breath
Wears a fine glove on one hand only
Never says a person's name twice in a day
Keeps a pet that is clearly the smarter of the two
Quotes a holy text that doesn't exist
Laughs at danger, flinches at kindness
Trades only in questions
Writes everything down in a cipher
Smells faintly of a place they deny visiting
Always sits facing the door
Collects teeth. Won't say whose
Speaks to their weapon like an old colleague
The toll bridge keeper hasn't aged in sixty years
A mine reopened last month. The ore sings
Wolves in the north hills walk on two legs when it rains
The baron's new advisor casts two shadows
A caravan arrived with one more wagon than it left with
Children in the ford village all drew the same door
There's a bounty on a beast nobody can describe twice the same way
The old temple bell rang once. It has no clapper
A dying knight is paying for one last escort east
Grain prices tripled because something is eating the fields at night
A prisoner in the keep insists the year is wrong
Fisherfolk pulled up a locked chest and refuse to open it
{3d6} silver in a rotted pouch
{2d6} silver and a bundle of trade goods worth as much again
{1d6} gold sewn into a coat lining
Silver ring worth {2d6} gold, initials inside
Map fragment, half a route and an X
Gemstone the size of a knuckle, worth {2d6} x 10 gold
A magic item
Deed to property in a town you haven't heard of
Candle that burns underwater. The light is green
Boots that leave someone else's footprints
Dagger that whispers the name of the last thing it cut
Cloak pin that warms when someone lies nearby
One-use scroll: the next door you touch opens, no matter what
Waterskin that refills at dawn with yesterday's weather
Iron key that fits no lock but always turns
Ring that lets you trade dreams with whoever wears its twin
Lantern that shows things as they were a year ago
Chalk that draws lines nothing mindless will cross
Whistle only the dead can hear. Something always listens
Coin that lands on its edge when the answer is 'neither'

tables.name: Reaction
tables.description: 2d6 when it isn't obvious how the other side feels.

rows.result: Hostile - attacks or moves to attack
Unfriendly - threats, demands, blocked path
Wary - keeps distance, can be talked to
Open - will trade, talk, or share the road
Helpful - offers aid, information, or shelter

tables.name: Morale
tables.description: 2d6 when a side takes real losses. Low is broken.

rows.result: Breaks - flees or surrenders immediately
Falters - fighting retreat, looking for exits
Holds - keeps fighting while it makes sense
Unshaken - fights on, presses the advantage
